objective:

"""
p = Path('.github/workflows/workflow_dispatch_queue_runner.yml')
text = p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
if 'governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/**' not in text:
    text = text.replace('on:\n  workflow_dispatch:', 'on:\n  workflow_dispatch:\n  push:\n    paths:\n      - "governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/**"')
p.write_text(text, encoding='utf-8')
q = Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem865_claude_write_selftest.json')
if q.exists():
    data = q.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
    q.write_text(data.rstrip() + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(p))
if q.exists():
    changed_files.append(str(q))
ops_applied.append('added push path trigger for workflow dispatch queue and touched BEM865 queue file')
